title: GitHub Pages Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub Pages hosting.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is 'GitHub Pages' used for?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To host a static website directly from a GitHub repository

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a GitHub-Pages-based workflow?
options: Enabling GitHub Pages in your repository's settings and choosing which branch to publish from
Recording a commit directly to the SQL server
Its only possible for SQL repositories
